usaid_gov_ai_kazakhstan.baseline_notes: Illustrative benchmark baseline for demo-only USAID proposal-ops storytelling. Assumes multi-review cycle and manual donor-logic consolidation before a reviewable first draft. Not measured customer baseline.

eu_digital_governance_moldova.baseline_notes: Illustrative benchmark baseline for demo-only EU intervention-logic workflows. Assumes manual drafting plus annex-verification passes before buyer-ready review. Not measured customer baseline.

worldbank_public_sector_uzbekistan.baseline_notes: Illustrative benchmark baseline for demo-only World Bank results-framework workflows. Assumes manual PDO/results-framework reconciliation and ISR-style review before internal approval. Not measured customer baseline.

giz_sme_resilience_ukraine.baseline_notes: Illustrative benchmark baseline for demo-only GIZ delivery and sustainability workflows. Assumes manual partner-role alignment, resilience package drafting, and implementation-review passes before internal review. Not measured customer baseline.

state_department_media_georgia.baseline_notes: Illustrative benchmark baseline for demo-only State Department media resilience workflows. Assumes manual strategic-context, risk, and partner safeguarding review before a reviewer-ready draft. Not measured customer baseline.

un_agencies_education_nepal.baseline_notes: Illustrative benchmark baseline for demo-only UN programme and sector-review workflows. Assumes manual partner verification, field-monitoring synthesis, and reporting alignment before internal review. Not measured customer baseline.
